notes: Installed via the Odra livenet backend (cargo odra build → wasm/Bastion.wasm, lowered to MVP).
Contract calls target the contract PACKAGE (byPackageHash) — byHash on a package hash is rejected as an Invalid transaction.
Full compliance lifecycle (insert_commitment → revoke) broadcast + confirmed on-chain via scripts/run_lifecycle.ts with BASTION_DEMO=false: holder 'mallory' admitted then autonomously revoked.

insert_commitment(commitment, _attestation_sig, new_root) — the deployed param keeps its leading underscore, which Odra exposes as the literal runtime arg name; sending 'attestation_sig' reverts with MissingArg (Odra code 64658 = 64536 + 122).
revoke(nullifier, commitment, reason_code:u8, new_root) verified against contract/src/bastion.rs.
